titleStmt.title: SII 17.537: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 537. (A.R. No. 495 of 1904.) VĒDĀRAṆYAM, TIRUTTURAIPPUNDI TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the first prākāra in the Vēdāraṇyēśvara temple.
The details of date, viz, Makara ba. 15, Monday, Pūśam are irregular.

This records the gift of 6 mākkāṇi land in Vikramaśōḻaṉ Kaḍambūr, as tiruviḷakkuppuṟam, by AraiyaṉUyyavandāṉ, of Kāṉattūr, for burning a perpetual lamp to the deity Tirumaṟaikkāḍu-uḍaiyār, in Umbaḷa-nāḍu.
The gift-land was purchased from Tuṇaiyirundāḷ Śāni, by the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 2 10 7 makara nāyaṟṟu Apa
ra pakṣattu pañcateciyum tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ Umpaḷanāṭṭu Uṭai
yār tirumaṟaikkāṭuṭaiyārkku kāṉattūrnāṭṭu Akkaḷūrkkāṇi Uṭaiya kāṉattūr kiḻa
vaṉ Araiyaṉ Uyyavantāṉeṉ nāṉ vaitta tirununtāviḷakku 1 Ivviḷakku Onṟukku
jantiracoḻavaḷanāṭṭut teṉkāl vikkiramacoḻaṉ kaṭampūril nāṉ koṇṭu viṭṭa nilam
vapama Innilam Āṟumākkāṇiyum kaṭamai Iṟuttu Iṟaimikiti koṇṭu cantirātit
tavaraiyum Ivviḷakkoṉṟum celvatāka vaitteṉ kāṉattūr kiḻavaṉ Araiyaṉ
Uyyavantāṉeṉ koṇṭu viṭṭa nilam māvatu Innāyanār tevatānattu
ṭaiyāy kommārattut tiruvaṭikaḷ paṭṭaṉai mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya tuṇai
yiruntāḷc cāni pakkal ṉāṉ vilai koṇṭuṭaiya nilam Āṟumākkāṇiyum tiruviḷakkup
puṟamāka viṭṭeṉ Araiyaṉ Uyyavanatāṉeṉ
Digital edition of SII 17.537 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
